lex.bot.audioanddtmfinputspecification.C: Specifies the audio and DTMF input specification.

lex.bot.audioanddtmfinputspecification.A.Description: Specifies the settings on audio input.

lex.bot.audioanddtmfinputspecification.D.Description: Specifies the settings on DTMF input.

lex.bot.audioanddtmfinputspecification.S.Description: Time for which a bot waits before assuming that the customer isn't going to speak or press a key. This timeout is shared between Audio and DTMF inputs.
